_comment_nist_fields: Fields below follow IR 8278Ar1 Section 3.2 OLIR template
focal_document_element_description: Systems integration (frontend developer) involves defining the static assets build; co-ordinating all aspects of the integration and take responsibility for the tests around the user interface; configure the part of the system that uses the network and test that it works as expected.
reference_document_element_description: Design and build LLM-based application systems, including system prompt design, tool integration, retrieval pipeline, output validation, and failure mode documentation.
comments: DDaT skill intersects with WIDAI AI domain. AI-T-006 is the strongest semantic match. Secondary: OP-A-003 (OP, cosine: 0.430), DA-S-007 (DA, cosine: 0.420).
_comment_widai_extensions: Fields below are WIDAI extensions per ADR-014

primary_method.name: Cross-Encoder STS
primary_method.description: Semantic Textual Similarity via cross-encoder regression trained on STS-Benchmark.
primary_method.significance: STS 4.0/10 (raw 0.401). Shared vocabulary: [build, integration, system, systems]. DDaT-only terms [around, aspects, assets, co, configure, defining] vs WIDAI-only terms [application, based, design, documentation, failure, llm] define the semantic distance between the descriptions.

bertscore.significance: BERTScore F1=0.852 (P=0.842, R=0.862). R exceeds P by 0.020 — the WIDAI KSA's 20 words are well-captured by the DDaT element's 43 words, but the DDaT element contains broader scope not fully reflected in the matched WIDAI KSA.

nli_cross_encoder.significance: NLI: contradiction-dominant (99.8%). Despite 'Intersects with' classification, the model detects semantic tension between "Systems integration (frontend developer) involves defining the static assets bui" and "Design and build LLM-based application systems, including system prompt design,". Indicates these concepts operate in adjacent but distinct professional domains — shared vocabulary, different application context.

biencoder_cosine.description: Bi-encoder sentence embeddings with cosine similarity.
biencoder_cosine.significance: Bi-encoder 0.446 ≈ STS 0.401 (gap 0.045). Independent encoding and cross-attention agree. Shared terms [build, integration, system, systems] are sufficient for independent encoding to detect the match.

jaccard_token.description: Token-level Jaccard similarity (intersection/union of lowercased word tokens).
jaccard_token.significance: Jaccard 10.4%. Shared tokens: [build, integration, system, systems]. DDaT-only: [around, aspects, assets, co, configure, defining]. WIDAI-only: [application, based, design, documentation, failure, llm].
